Title: NullPointerException in UserService.getUser()
Description: NullPointerException thrown when userId parameter is null in UserService.getUser() method.
StackTrace:
java.lang.NullPointerException
  at com.app.UserService.getUser(UserService.java:42)
  at com.app.controllers.UserController.profile(UserController.java:88)
ExpectedBehavior: Return empty Optional when userId is null.
ActualBehavior: Application crashes with HTTP 500.

Title: IndexError on CSV parse with missing columns
Description: IndexError raised when input CSV has fewer columns than expected on line 87 of data_processor.py.
StackTrace:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "data_processor.py", line 87, in process
    value = row[5]
IndexError: list index out of range
ExpectedBehavior: Parse file successfully and skip malformed rows.
ActualBehavior: Script crashes on any CSV with fewer than 6 columns.

Title: Memory leak in WebSocket connection handler
Description: Heap memory grows by ~50 MB per hour under moderate load. WebSocket connections not closed properly.
StackTrace:
No stack trace. Profiler output:
  Retained: 512 MB after 10 hours
  Source: websocket_handler.py:ConnectionPool
ActualBehavior: Heap grows unbounded until OOM.

Title: SQL injection in login endpoint
Description: User input is concatenated directly into the SQL query string in auth/login.py line 34.
StackTrace:
No exception. Payload: ' OR 1=1 --
  Query executed: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username='' OR 1=1 --'
ActualBehavior: All authentication is bypassed.

Title: Unhandled Promise rejection in fetchUserData
Description: Async function fetchUserData() has no .catch() or try/catch block. Causes silent failures in production.
StackTrace:
UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning: Error: Network request failed
  at fetchUserData (api/client.js:55)
  at async loadDashboard (pages/dashboard.js:23)
ExpectedBehavior: Data should load with error feedback on failure.
ActualBehavior: Errors are swallowed silently; UI shows blank panel.

Title: Race condition in concurrent file writes
Description: Two threads write to the same output file simultaneously causing data corruption.
StackTrace:
java.io.IOException: Broken pipe
  at FileWriter.write(FileWriter.java:112)
  at ReportGenerator.run(ReportGenerator.java:67)
ActualBehavior: Last-write-wins corruption; partial data in output.

Title: JWT token missing exp claim
Description: JWT tokens are signed without an expiry claim. Tokens remain valid indefinitely.
ActualBehavior: Tokens never expire; revocation is impossible.

Title: Infinite loop in recursive tree traversal
Description: DFS traversal enters infinite loop when the graph contains a cycle.
StackTrace:
Process killed after CPU at 100% for 60 s
  Last frame: tree.py:traverse() line 88 (recursive call)
ActualBehavior: CPU pegged at 100%; process must be killed.

Title: AttributeError on uninitialised config value
Description: Config value DB_HOST read before initialisation returns None. strip() call fails.
StackTrace:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "db/connection.py", line 19, in connect
    host = config.DB_HOST.strip()
AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'strip'
ExpectedBehavior: App reads DB_HOST from environment and connects.
ActualBehavior: Crash at startup if DB_HOST is not set.

Title: Missing CORS headers block frontend API calls
Description: API responses missing Access-Control-Allow-Origin header. Frontend blocked by browser.
StackTrace:
No server exception.
  Browser console: Access to XMLHttpRequest blocked by CORS policy
ActualBehavior: All cross-origin API calls fail in browser.

Title: Deadlock in database connection pool
Description: Two threads each hold one lock and wait for the other. Application hangs indefinitely.
StackTrace:
java.lang.Thread.State: WAITING
  at ConnectionPool.acquire(ConnectionPool.java:78)
  Deadlock detected: Thread-1 ↔ Thread-2
ActualBehavior: Application freezes under concurrent load.

Title: Integer overflow in payment amount calculation
Description: 32-bit integer used for payment total overflows when amount > $2147483647.
StackTrace:
No exception. Calculated total: -2147483648 (overflow)
  at PaymentService.calculateTotal(PaymentService.java:56)
ActualBehavior: Negative amounts charged for large orders.

Title: XSS vulnerability in user comment rendering
Description: User-submitted HTML in comments is rendered without sanitisation.
StackTrace:
Payload: <script>alert(document.cookie)</script>
  Executed in victim's browser.
ActualBehavior: Arbitrary JS executes in any visitor's browser.

Title: File path traversal in document download
Description: filename parameter in /download endpoint not sanitised. Allows reading arbitrary server files.
StackTrace:
GET /download?filename=../../etc/passwd
  Response: root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bash ...
ExpectedBehavior: Only files in /uploads/ can be downloaded.
ActualBehavior: Any server file readable by the process is exposed.

Title: Segmentation fault in C extension on large input
Description: C extension module crashes with SIGSEGV when input array exceeds 1 million elements.
StackTrace:
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
  #0  0x00007f3a4c2d1234 in process_array()
  #1  0x00007f3a4c2d5678 in PyArg_ParseTuple()
ExpectedBehavior: Process arrays of any size without crashing.
ActualBehavior: Hard crash; no Python exception caught.

Title: Hardcoded credentials in database config
Description: Database password hardcoded as plain text in db/config.py committed to Git.
StackTrace:
No exception.
  config.py line 7: DB_PASSWORD = "prod_secret_pass123"
ActualBehavior: Password exposed in version control history.

Title: React component re-renders on every keystroke
Description: Product list component re-renders on every keystroke in search box due to missing dependency array.
StackTrace:
React DevTools Profiler:
  ProductList rendered 847 times in 10 s
  Trigger: SearchBox state update
ExpectedBehavior: Component renders only when search term changes.
ActualBehavior: UI becomes sluggish on slow devices.

Title: Timezone-naive datetime stored in UTC column
Description: datetime.now() used instead of datetime.utcnow() or datetime.now(utc). Off-by-hours bugs in reports.
StackTrace:
No exception.
  Stored: 2024-01-26 10:00:00 (local)
  Expected: 2024-01-26 15:00:00 (UTC)
ActualBehavior: Reports show wrong times for non-UTC users.

Title: Insecure direct object reference in order API
Description: Order ID accepted directly from URL; no ownership check. Any user can access others' orders.
StackTrace:
GET /api/orders/99999
  Response: order data for user_456 (requested by user_123)
ExpectedBehavior: Only the owning user can view their orders.
ActualBehavior: Any authenticated user can read any order.

Title: Unclosed file handle causes resource exhaustion
Description: open() used without context manager or explicit close(). File handles exhausted under load.
StackTrace:
OSError: [Errno 24] Too many open files
  at FileProcessor.read(file_processor.py:34)
ActualBehavior: Process runs out of file descriptors after ~1024 ops.
